violations.text: The double doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The bottom shelf of the prep table located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the milk chest #1 have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen and cafeteria double doors, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the kid's shared refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
An air break system is installed where air gap is required at the food prep AND 3 bay dish sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Ceiling tile above freezer unit is not installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Missing ceiling tile observed above refrigeration unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

At the time of inspection, no staff members were present that are certified in food safety. Per interview with PIC, PIC is enrolled in food safety certification class. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the kitchen and the dining area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Serve Safe certified manager will need to apply for RIDOH FMC license. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2023
